candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred candidate and matches total sales/revenue concept exactly.
Not revenue; gross profit after COGS, so not appropriate.

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense label; suitable for XRD even though it appears in the supplemental section below operating income.

candidates.why: Most direct recurring interest expense line; preferred over broader finance totals to avoid mixing non-interest items.
Broader finance cost total that may include non-interest items; less preferred than direct interest expense.

Recurring interest-related item, but may already be included in the main interest expense line; risk of double counting.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses on defined- benefit pension obligations
candidates.why: Interest-like finance cost, but may overlap with broader finance lines; not selected to avoid double counting.

variables.notes: Selected the direct interest expense row only. Excluded broader finance totals and subcomponents to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Best available equity line on the balance sheet. No separate parent/owners' equity line is shown.
